name: Sierra
description: Enterprise AI agent platform for conversational concierge experiences. Autonomous agents handle complex multi-turn conversations across digital, messaging, and voice channels with outcome-based pricing.
pricing: Outcome-based pricing model; contracts typically start $150K-$1.5M+ annually
notes: Co-founded by Bret Taylor (former Salesforce co-CEO) and Clay Bavor (former Google). Raised $350M in Sept 2025 at $10B valuation. Targets Fortune 100 companies across financial services, healthcare, retail. Sierra Agent OS 2.0 released emphasizing unified agent across channels.
